compressed_prompt: Write an itinerary for a trip to a grocery store in Lima to buy some local goods. Make the itinerary funny, write it in all capital letters and include the keywords 'DISGUSTING', 'DELICIOUS', 'BAD', and 'GOOD'.
response:
ITINERARY FOR YOUR EPIC GROCERY ADVENTURE IN LIMA! READY YOUR SHOPPING CARTS AND PREPARE FOR A JOURNEY FULL OF DISGUSTING, DELICIOUS, BAD, AND GOOD FINDS!

08:00 AM - RISE AND SHINE! PUT ON YOUR MOST FABULOUS GROCERY-SHOPPING OUTFIT. REMEMBER, YOU'RE HUNTING FOR THE FINEST LOCAL GOODS LIMA HAS TO OFFER!

08:30 AM - BREAKFAST OF CHAMPIONS! FUEL UP WITH SOME 'DISGUSTING' BUT SURPRISINGLY ADDICTIVE 'ANTICUCHO' - MARINATED MEAT SKEWERS. DON'T JUDGE, JUST EAT!

09:00 AM - ARRIVE AT THE GROCERY STORE. TAKE A MOMENT TO MARVEL AT THE ARRAY OF COLORS, SMELLS, AND SOUNDS. THIS IS GOING TO BE ONE WILD RIDE!

09:15 AM - HEAD TO THE FRUIT SECTION. PICK UP SOME 'BAD' BUT IRRESISTIBLY SWEET LUCUMA. IT'S LIKE THE UNIVERSE'S WAY OF SAYING 'I'M SORRY FOR THE PAIN I'VE CAUSED.'

09:30 AM - NEXT STOP, THE VEGETABLE AISLE. GRAB SOME 'GOOD' AND NUTRICIOUS YUCA. IT'S LIKE A POTATO AND A TREE HAD A BABY.

09:45 AM - TIME TO EXPLORE THE MEAT SECTION. BEWARE, THE 'DISGUSTING' BUT AUTHENTIC CUY (GUINEA PIG) MIGHT GIVE YOU NIGHTMARES. BUT HEY, YOU CAME FOR LOCAL GOODS, RIGHT?

10:00 AM - MAKE YOUR WAY TO THE DAIRY SECTION. THE 'BAD' BUT SURPRISINGLY DELICIOUS 'MANJAR BLANCO' (A TYPE OF CREAM) WILL MAKE YOU QUESTION YOUR LIFE CHOICES.

10:15 AM - DON'T FORGET THE 'GOOD' AND 'DELICIOUS' PERUVIAN CHOCOLATE! IT'S LIKE A HUG FROM THE COCOA GODS.

10:30 AM - FINALLY, GRAB SOME 'GOOD' AND 'DELICIOUS' PERUVIAN CHIPS. BECAUSE WHY NOT?

10:45 AM - CHECKOUT TIME! SAY YOUR GOODBIES TO YOUR SHOPPING CART AND HEAD HOME WITH YOUR BOUNTY OF DISGUSTING, DELICIOUS, BAD, AND GOOD FINDS.

11:00 AM - CONGRATULATIONS! YOU'VE SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETED YOUR GROCERY ADVENTURE IN LIMA. NOW, ENJOY YOUR NEWLY ACQUIRED LOCAL GOODS!
